overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a high-speed nighttime journey through a rain-soaked futuristic highway system. The drive begins on open multi-lane roads illuminated by holographic billboards, transitions through elevated sections with concrete barriers, and concludes with a sharp deceleration on a curved exit ramp while following another vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway with holographic advertising billboards

events.description: accelerating from 40 km/h to 80 km/h on the wet highway surface
passing under first highway overpass, briefly darkening the windshield view

agents.ego_description: accelerating steadily through the rain-slicked highway, passing illuminated billboards and street lights

entered.detail: futuristic car dashboard with red holographic speedometer and navigation readouts visible throughout the clip
large red-lit holographic advertisement billboard visible in the distance
tall industrial street lights lining the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic vehicle driving on a rain-soaked multi-lane highway at night. The dashboard displays red holographic readouts while the vehicle accelerates past glowing billboards and under highway overpasses. Heavy rain streaks across the windshield as the car builds speed on the open road.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with concrete noise barriers and overhead signage

events.description: passing under large overhead highway sign gantry with directional markers
beginning to decelerate from 100 km/h as approaching the exit ramp

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed while navigating gentle highway curves, passing under multiple overpasses

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with yellow stripe separating highway lanes from the drop
large green highway direction sign suspended over the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues at high speed along an elevated highway section lined with concrete noise barriers. The camera passes under several overpasses and large overhead directional signs while maintaining speeds around 90-100 km/h. The environment remains consistently wet and foggy with artificial lighting illuminating the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway exit ramp with chevron warning signs

events.description: sharp braking and deceleration from 70 km/h down to 30 km/h entering the tight curve
closing distance on lead vehicle ahead while navigating the curved ramp

agents.ego_description: slowing down significantly to navigate the tight curved exit ramp, following a lead vehicle with brake lights illuminated

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead on the curved ramp, maintaining low speed with brake lights on

entered.detail: yellow and black arrow signs mounted on the curved ramp walls indicating turn direction
yellow and black arrow signs mounted on the curved ramp walls indicating turn direction
close concrete barriers enclosing the tight curved exit ramp on both sides

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow, enclosed exit ramp with tight curves marked by chevron warning signs on the concrete walls. Speed drops dramatically from highway speeds to 25 km/h as the driver navigates the sharp turn. A red sedan is visible ahead with its brake lights on, guiding the way through the curved, sheltering ramp structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed first-person drive through a rain-soaked futuristic highway that transitions from an open, neon-lit expanse into a narrow, enclosed exit ramp. It begins inside a vehicle accelerating past glowing billboards and under highway overpasses, with red holographic readouts on the dashboard and heavy rain streaking across the windshield. As the car maintains its momentum, the scene shifts to an elevated section of the road lined with concrete noise barriers and large overhead directional signs amidst a wet, foggy atmosphere. The environment then tightens as the vehicle enters a curving exit ramp marked by chevron warning signs, causing the speed to drop dramatically. Finally, the camera follows a red sedan with glowing brake lights, guiding the way through the sharp turns of the sheltering concrete structure.
